untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'fundamental screening conditions' and 'no hard resistance within 2% above current price' — fundamental screening is not available in technical indicators, and resistance detection requires pattern recognition beyond the allowed indicator set. The exit condition 'Close below breakout price - 3%' cannot be precisely encoded without tracking the entry price dynamically, which exceeds operator capability.
translation_notes: Translated 'new 10-day high' to Donchian channel upper band (dc_upper) as the closest technical proxy for a 10-period high. Added pivot comparison as secondary resistance check. Entry assumes LONG direction per signal intent. Stop loss set to 3% per parameters. Exit logic uses OR logic to capture either exit condition when available. Fundamental and dynamic resistance conditions marked untranslatable.
